**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Triggering the heavy industry cover demotion and the stripping of the rural hardware painting factory prototype. The AI-generated Apple global electronics OEM template in the original data has been physically destroyed. This enterprise, named 'Landun Aviation Equipment Manufacturing,' relying on its domineering name and the 'aviation electronic equipment manufacturing' in the first sentence of its license, was directly pushed to the pinnacle throne of 'Aviation, Spacecraft and Equipment Manufacturing' by the commercial system and recognized as a 'Small Enterprise.' However, the forensic probe directly cut into its physical fatal flaw: its registered address is located at 'No. 63 Yongfeng Road, Zhougang Community, Hushu Subdistrict, Jiangning District.' This is a typical Nanjing far-suburban township/village industrial compound address. The extremum probe shows: 26 insured employees, paid-in capital of only 200,000. In a village-level industrial compound, with 200,000 in capital, leading 20-odd workers to 'manufacture aviation electronic equipment and marine auxiliary equipment'? This is completely bankrupt in physics and industrial logic. The probe mercilessly tore off the 'all-powerful sea, land, and air' facade, finding its true survival craft in the latter half of the business license: 'spray painting, baking paint processing services; steel structure manufacturing; metal component manufacturing and processing.' The truth lands: this is absolutely not a military-industrial giant capable of building airplanes, but a Rural Metalworking & Painting Workshop. The boss leads twenty or thirty workers, taking on steel structure welding and sheet metal processing jobs in a rural factory; its core business is highly likely providing outsourced painting and baking paint services for metal parts for surrounding machinery factories. The so-called 'aviation equipment manufacturing' is highly likely just crazy 'scope padding' resulting from receiving a tiny order to paint hardware casings on the absolute fringe of some aviation factory.
